title_en: NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1: An Open Foundation Model for Humanoid Robots
title_zh: NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1：面向人形机器人的开放基础模型
abstract_en: GR00T N1 is NVIDIA's open humanoid robot foundation model, positioned as a general policy and reasoning stack for robot skills and transfer.
abstract_zh: GR00T N1 是 NVIDIA 推出的人形机器人开放基础模型，被定位为面向机器人技能与迁移的通用策略和推理栈。
editorial_summary_zh: 把世界模型、VLA 和物理 AI 基础设施进一步合流到人形机器人路线中。
editorial_summary_en: A strong signal that world-model-style infrastructure is converging with humanoid robotics.
why_it_matters: It links world modeling, simulation, and robot policy transfer into a practical platform story for embodied AI.
